title: Harmonize Your UI: Master CSS 'font-size-adjust' for Consistent Web Font X-Heights
tweet: Ever notice visual jumps when web fonts fail? CSS 'font-size-adjust' maintains consistent x-heights between your primary and fallback fonts, ensuring visual harmony and a smoother #UserExperience. A must-know for #UIDesign! #CSSTypography #WebFonts
tip: Leverage CSS 'font-size-adjust' to prevent jarring visual shifts when web fonts load or fail. By normalizing the x-height of your fallback fonts to match your primary font, you ensure superior readability and maintain a consistent aesthetic, crucial for polished UI design.
